about.story: I'm 18 years old and have been programming for 1 year. In this time, I've gone from writing my first lines of code to building full commercial projects. I specialize in modern websites, Telegram bots, and AI solutions.
about.story2: My goal is not just to build websites, but powerful digital tools that help businesses grow and attract clients. Every project is an opportunity to create something truly outstanding.

legalmasters.title: Capital Legal Masters
legalmasters.description: Premium multilingual corporate website for a modern law firm. Elegant design, full multilingual support (RU/EN/UZ), modern animations.
legalmasters.full_description: Capital Legal Masters is a premium corporate website for a law firm. The project was developed with a focus on trust, professionalism, and an elegant light design: a clean white interface, dark navy typography, and refined red accents in the style of an international law firm. Full multilingual support in Russian, English, and Uzbek. Optimized for SEO and performance.
legalmasters.overview: Capital Legal Masters came to me to build a premium digital presence that reflects their reputation as a top-tier law firm. The goal: a corporate website that builds instant trust and turns visitors into consultation clients.
legalmasters.challenge: The firm had no modern web presence, while competitors looked dated. They needed a solution that worked across three languages, established trust instantly, and loaded fast enough to rank in a competitive market.
challenge_points: No modern web presence to build on
Had to serve clients in 3 languages
legalmasters.solution: I designed an elegant light identity with a clean white interface, dark navy typography, and refined red accents — a modern international law firm aesthetic. The site is built on Next.js with server rendering for speed and SEO, a complete multilingual system, and smooth Framer Motion animations.
solution_points: Light premium identity: white interface, navy typography, red accents
Next.js with SSR for peak performance
Complete i18n system across three languages
legalmasters.responsive_text: Every section adapts perfectly across mobile, tablet, and desktop. Content reflows fluidly, keeping the premium look intact on screens of any size.
legalmasters.multilingual_text: Built with next-intl: visitors switch seamlessly between Russian, Uzbek, and English. Language choice is persisted, and metadata is localized for SEO in every region.
